productDisplayName: Peter England Men Stripes Black Trouser
description: Composition Black trouser made of a cotton blend fabric, has flat front, pockets on the sides, two pockets at the back with button closures, looped waist, and a zipper and button closure on the front Fitting Smart Wash care Machine wash warm in a gentle cycle, using a mild detergent Use only non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low Warm iron Crafted from a soft cotton blend fabric, this striped trouser from the Transitions collection of peter england is a perfect garment for you to step into style in ease. With smart cuts that offer a flattering Fit, this trouser makes for a great addition to your wardrobe. Team it with crisp formals, classy accessories and leather shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
